text: The pager screams like it has a personal problem with silence.
The hall smells like antiseptic and adrenaline. Someone shouts: “Triage—now!”

text.text: Demo hook: triage decisions. HP changes only when stress or harm is explained.

choices.text: Grab a 10-second brief from the charge nurse.

text: The room is already chaos: one patient pale, one patient panicked, and staff trying to do three jobs at once.

choices.text: Call the first clear order and take control.

lines.text: The hesitation costs you—your heart pounds and your hands shake.

text: The charge nurse grabs your sleeve. “Two arrivals. One looks critical. One’s crashing emotionally—watch the room.”
You feel calmer—not because things are better, but because you understand them.

choices.text: Go to triage with the brief.

lines.text: Clarity helps. You’re less likely to take a penalty here.

text: A staff member looks at you like you just became the person they were waiting for.

text.text: Future: reputation choices live here. For now, this is a clean demo beat.

text: The crisis doesn’t end. It just becomes the new normal.

text.text: Code Blue demo stub complete. Next: romance/drama branches + reputation economy.
